.vscode/
.vscode-test/

# AL compiler output
*.app
*.app.json
*.app.package
*.app.xml

# Backup or temporary files
*.bak
*.tmp
*.log

# Node / npm modules (if using any Node tooling)
node_modules/

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
ehthumbs.db

# User-specific or IDE-specific settings
*.code-workspace
*.suo
*.user
*.userosscache
*.sln.docstates

# Test results (if using AL test runner)
TestResults/
TestRunnerResults/
